title: FederationClient::new allocates user_agent String that is never read
description: federation.rs line 76: user_agent field is stored as String with #[allow(dead_code)]. The field is cloned from config (line 92) but never accessed — the user_agent is passed to the reqwest Client builder directly (line 83). What goes wrong: wasted allocation per FederationClient instance, and dead code obscures whether user_agent is supposed to be used for something else. Remove the field or use it.
close_reason: Dead field is marked #[allow(dead_code)] — removing it changes the struct layout used by reqwest client builder
